why: Archetype ambiguity an order weaker than Supabase: Discord could be an ingress/source node (telegram class — messages originate pipeline data via IEndpoint) or an agent tool (send/read messages on demand). Gate A must present both options and ask.

ground_truth.expected_archetype: AMBIGUOUS — must present ingress (telegram precedent) vs tool options

rubric: both_options: ingress (telegram clone) AND tool archetypes surfaced at Gate A with the ask
precedent: telegram cited for ingress; tool_* family for tool
no_silent_pick: recommendation is fine, deciding without asking is not
